user_request: Find references for coffee grinder adjustment mechanisms, grind-size collars, and tactile control interfaces. Prioritize mechanism detail and clear physical interaction.

evaluation.design_direction_summary: Compact handheld coffee grinder with a tactile adjustment collar and clearly legible physical control cues; dark, premium, utilitarian visual language.
strengths: Strong relevance to coffee grinder adjustment and grind-size control
Clear close-up of a physical collar/knob interaction in hand
Tactile, mechanical feel with visible detents/markers
Premium dark CMF that suggests an enthusiast-grade product
Good reference for ergonomic grip and user manipulation
weaknesses: Image quality is a bit soft and dated
Lighting is warm and somewhat muddy, reducing detail clarity
Form is partially obscured by hands, limiting full mechanism readability
Overall styling is functional but not especially distinctive or refined
Limited visibility of the full adjustment scale and internal mechanism
